spec_match.rationale: Allows live tuning of text-fit parameters with a real-time rendered preview and CSSOM inspection.

interactive.rationale: Features interactive ranges, inputs, and dropdowns that immediately update a live visual preview.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede and interactive dials align perfectly with explaining and exploring the CSSOM parameters of the new property.

edge_cases.rationale: Exposes the crucial 'white-space: nowrap' requirement as a control and handles unsupported browsers gracefully.

references.rationale: The parent feature index cites the ChromeStatus feature link, which this page links back to.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to CSS custom properties, using the shared palette variables and providing an interactive resizable wrapper.

summary: A high-quality API exploration console that demonstrates the parameters, capability detection, and CSSOM interfaces of the text-fit property.
